ext_name.description: Extension name (brand, kept identical across locales).

ext_desc.message: Sends tab audio and window positions to the nyan Real Audio Wall OBS source over a local WebSocket, so each browser window sounds from where it is on the virtual screen.
ext_desc.description: Extension description shown in chrome://extensions and the store listing.

options_port_label.message: WebSocket port (the same number as "Browser link port" in the OBS nyan Real Audio Wall source):

options_note.message: Audio from playing tabs is heard only through OBS (the tab itself goes silent).
